{
  "analysis": "Package installation succeeded. The import verification started and printed pandas, numpy, pgmpy, and networkx, but the prompt has not returned and the pandas exploration command may be queued or not yet executed. We need to wait briefly and then inspect dataset statistics/correlations to infer the 6-edge DAG.",
  "plan": "First wait for the prior command to finish. Then run a compact Python exploration script that prints columns, shape, correlations, pairwise conditional independence tests, and regression coefficients for each variable. This will help identify the DAG structure.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "
",
      "duration": 2.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd, numpy as np
df=pd.read_csv('/app/bn_sample_10k.csv')
print('columns:', list(df.columns))
print('shape:', df.shape)
print(df.head())
print('describe:')
print(df.describe())
print('corr:')
print(df.corr().round(3))
print('partial corr given others:')
cols=list(df.columns)
C=np.cov(df.values.T)
P=np.linalg.inv(C)
pc=-np.outer(np.diag(P),np.diag(P))**-0.5*P
pc=pd.DataFrame(pc,index=cols,columns=cols).round(3)
np.fill_diagonal(pc.values,1)
print(pc)
print('regression each var on others:')
import statsmodels.api as sm
for y in cols:
    X=df.drop(columns=y)
    X=sm.add_constant(X)
    m=sm.OLS(df[y],X).fit()
    print('\\n'+y)
    print(m.params.round(3).to_string())
    print('r2',round(m.rsquared,3))
PY
",
      "duration": 1.0
    }
  ]
}
